pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh checks.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh checks.
Confirmed via Python injection script in setup_task.sh and explicit string matching in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated NASA GISTEMP historical datasets created during setup. It is confirmed that the target output paths (/home/ga/Documents/generate_climate_bars.py and /home/ga/Documents/climate_bars.html), expected title 'Global Temperature Anomalies', and required ground truth anomaly points (1900: -0.09, 1950: -0.17, 2016: 0.99) perfectly match the instructions and the logic checked in export_result.sh. Furthermore, it was discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is missing entirely from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
